registry.name: Australian MCP Registry
registry.description: Open registry of MCP servers for Australian services

servers.name: au-grocery-mcp
servers.description: Australian grocery MCP server. Search products, compare prices, and get details across Woolworths and Coles.
servers.author: Agents Formation

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for grocery products across Australian supermarkets. Returns product names, prices, and availability.

tools.name: compare_prices
tools.description: Compare prices for a list of grocery items across Woolworths and Coles. Returns the cheapest option for each item and total savings.

items.description: List of items to compare, e.g. ['milk 2L', 'bread', 'eggs']

tools.name: get_product_detail
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Woolworths product including ingredients, nutrition, and pricing.

tools.name: get_categories
tools.description: List all product categories available at Woolworths.

planned.name: au-flights-mcp
planned.description: Search and compare domestic and international flights from Australian carriers.

planned.name: au-energy-mcp
planned.description: Compare electricity and gas plans across Australian energy retailers.

planned.name: au-insurance-mcp
planned.description: Get car, home, and health insurance quotes from Australian providers.

planned.name: au-vehicle-hire-mcp
planned.description: Search and book car, truck, and van rentals across Australian cities.

planned.name: au-telco-mcp
planned.description: Compare mobile, broadband, and NBN plans from Australian telcos.

planned.name: au-gov-mcp
planned.description: Check eligibility, application status, and service availability for Australian government services.
